outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed short-term due to positive 0DTE GEX, but high risk of volatility explosion in outer months (negative GEX).
outlook.summary: Market is pinned between the 0DTE Gamma Flip (658.29) and the 0DTE Max Pain (655). While 0DTE shows stability (Positive GEX), the structural bearishness (High PCR, Smirk Skew, Negative Weekly/Monthly GEX) suggests underlying fragility. Expect pinning at 655-660 for the session, with downside risk escalating if 655 breaks.

levels.motivazione: 0DTE Max Pain + Significant Put OI across all 3 expiries (0DTE, Weekly, Monthly). Primary magnetic support level.
Intraday equilibrium point. Spot is oscillating right at the flip zone, indicating a battle for directional control.
Massive structural support. Largest Put OI in Weekly (53k) and Monthly (110k). Institutional 'floor'.
Weekly Max Pain and heavy Call OI congestion. Acts as immediate resistance capping the upside.
Dominant Call Open Interest for the current daily session (18.9k OI). Hard ceiling for 0DTE.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated volatility expected - spot trapped at gamma flip with negative GEX in Weekly/Monthly expiries amplifying potential moves
outlook.summary: Spot (589.8) pinned at critical gamma flip zone (590.57). Bearish smirk skew across all expiries (ratio 1.44-1.50) confirms fear premium on puts. 0DTE stable (+0.84B GEX) but Weekly (-0.21B) and Monthly (-0.65B) negative GEX signal volatility expansion ahead. Strong RESONANCE at 590 and 600 defines the battlefield.

levels.motivazione: Dominant PUT OI across ALL 3 expiries (50,546 combined). Spot testing this level. Extreme volume (156K vs 9.3K OI = 16.8x) signals active MM hedging war. Weekly Max Pain alignment strengthens attraction.
Spot (589.8) trapped below gamma flip. Positive 0DTE GEX suppresses immediate volatility, but negative Weekly/Monthly GEX creates directional pressure. Break above = bullish acceleration.
Massive CALL OI across ALL 3 expiries (49,560 combined). Weekly #1 CALL (14,900), Monthly #1 CALL (27,151). Hard ceiling with strong dealer resistance.
0DTE Max Pain level 0.5% below spot. Natural MM target for pin risk at expiry. Bearish skew supports downside attraction.
Highest 0DTE CALL OI (20,324). Immediate resistance above spot. Volume 75K confirms active positioning. Near-term target for bulls.
Weekly highest PUT OI (34,229) + Monthly (20,890). PCR 1.56 Weekly confirms bearish sentiment. Structural support for swing trades.
Monthly highest PUT OI (44,358) + Weekly (13,193). Deep support zone. Strong dealer defense expected if tested.
Weekly PUT OI (11,847) + Monthly (30,078). Intermediate support between spot and deeper structural levels.
